title: Open Data Policy Version 2.0
summary: Sets the government’s open data strategy and policy framework, including public access, reuse, publication formats, and exclusions for restricted, sensitive, private, or protected data.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Current national policy for publishing and reusing Bahrain government open data.

notes: Related instruments: Supersedes earlier Open Government Data Policy versions and is supported by the Bahrain Government Open Data License
